name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi3_road_safety
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi3_road_safety' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`capital works planned start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`capital works planned finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`capital works actual start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`capital works actual finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`task planned start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`task planned finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`task actual start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`task actual finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Contractual Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`due date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`IncompleteDaysOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DaysUntilOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedDaysOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`capital works planned start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`capital works planned finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`capital works actual start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`capital works actual finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`task planned start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`task planned finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`task actual start` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`task actual finish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Contractual Due Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`due date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`IncompleteDaysOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DaysUntilOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedDaysOverdue` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'capital works planned start|capital works planned finish|capital works actual start|capital works actual finish|task planned start|task planned finish|task actual start|task actual finish|Contractual Due Date|due date|IncompleteDaysOverdue|DaysUntilOverdue|CompletedDaysOverdue' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi3_road_safety`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_kpi3_road_safety' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
